metadata.extraction_note: Complete inventory of all documented Telegram Bot API methods

methods.description: A simple method for testing your bot's auth token.
Receive incoming updates using long polling.

params.name: offset
params.description: Identifier of the first update to be returned

params.name: limit
params.description: Limits the number of updates to be retrieved (1-100, default 100)

params.name: timeout
params.description: Timeout in seconds for long polling

params.name: allowed_updates
params.description: List of update types to receive

methods.description: Specify a URL and receive incoming updates via an outgoing webhook.

params.name: url
params.description: HTTPS URL to send updates to

params.name: certificate
params.description: Upload your public key certificate

params.name: ip_address
params.description: Fix the IP address which will be used to send webhook requests

params.name: max_connections
params.description: Maximum allowed number of simultaneous webhook connections (1-100, default 40)

params.name: allowed_updates
params.description: List of update types to receive

params.name: drop_pending_updates
params.description: Pass True to drop all pending updates before switching to webhook

params.name: secret_token
params.description: Secret token for validating webhook requests

methods.description: Remove webhook integration if you decide to switch back to long polling.

params.name: drop_pending_updates
params.description: Pass True to drop all pending updates

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username

params.name: text
params.description: Text of the message to be sent

params.name: business_connection_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the business connection

params.name: message_thread_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target message thread

params.name: parse_mode
params.description: Mode for parsing entities in the message (HTML, Markdown, MarkdownV2)

params.name: entities
params.description: Array of MessageEntity objects

params.name: link_preview_options
params.description: Link preview generation options

params.name: reply_markup
params.description: Additional interface options (InlineKeyboardMarkup, ReplyKeyboardMarkup, etc.)

params.name: reply_parameters
params.description: Description of the message to which the sent message is a reply

params.name: protect_content
params.description: Protects the contents of the sent message from forwarding and saving

params.name: effect_id
params.description: Unique identifier of the message effect

params.name: allow_paid_broadcast
params.description: Pass True if the message should be sent for paid broadcast
